info.title: green-nx
info.author: rmrf404
info.details: Standalone Xbox Cloud Gaming (xCloud) client for the Switch. Sign in with your Microsoft account using a device code, browse your Game Pass Ultimate library with box art and search, and stream games at 720p / 1080p/ 1080p HQ with 60 fps video, Opus audio and full controller support. Streaming is fully native: WebRTC connection, hardware H.264 decoding (NVDEC) and zero-copy GPU rendering happen on the console itself. \n\nRequires an active Game Pass Ultimate subscription and launching in title mode (hold R while starting an installed game) for hardware decoding. Fun, experimental, non-commercial project, not affiliated with Microsoft or Nintendo.
